tasks.title: Add failed attempt counter to PinService
tasks.prompt: In lib/services/pin_service.dart, add two new secure-storage keys: 'pin_failed_count' (int) and 'pin_lockout_until' (ISO 8601 timestamp). Add methods: getFailedCount(), incrementFailedCount(), getLockoutUntil(), setLockoutUntil(DateTime), and resetFailedAttempts(). All state must persist across app restarts via FlutterSecureStorage.

cases: getFailedCount returns 0 on fresh install
incrementFailedCount persists across reads
resetFailedAttempts sets count to 0 and clears lockout
setLockoutUntil stores and getLockoutUntil retrieves a DateTime

tasks.done_when: All 4 unit tests pass. flutter analyze reports no errors in pin_service.dart.

tasks.title: Implement escalating lockout logic in PinService
tasks.prompt: In lib/services/pin_service.dart, add method verifyPinWithRateLimit(String pin) that returns a record (bool success, bool isLocked, int remainingSeconds). Logic: check if currently locked out first. If locked, return locked status with remaining seconds. If not locked, verify PIN. On failure, increment counter and apply lockout: 1-3 failures = no lockout, 4-5 = 2 second lockout, 6-9 = 30 second lockout, 10+ = 300 second (5 min) lockout then reset counter. On success, call resetFailedAttempts().

cases: 3 wrong PINs: no lockout, success=false, isLocked=false
4th wrong PIN: isLocked=true, remainingSeconds=2
6th wrong PIN: isLocked=true, remainingSeconds=30
10th wrong PIN: isLocked=true, remainingSeconds=300
Correct PIN after failures: success=true, counter resets to 0
Locked out state: returns isLocked=true without checking PIN

tasks.done_when: All 6 unit tests pass.

tasks.title: Update PinScreen UI for lockout feedback
tasks.prompt: In lib/screens/pin_screen.dart, replace the call to _pinService.verifyPin() with verifyPinWithRateLimit(). When isLocked is true: disable all number pad buttons (grey them out), display a countdown message like 'Locked out. Try again in Xs' that updates every second using a periodic Timer. When lockout expires, re-enable the numpad and reset the message to 'Enter your PIN'. On successful verify, call resetFailedAttempts().

cases: Number pad is disabled during lockout
Countdown message displays remaining seconds
Number pad re-enables after lockout expires
Successful PIN entry after lockout works normally

tasks.done_when: Widget tests pass. Manual test: enter 4 wrong PINs and see the 2s lockout message with disabled buttons.

tasks.title: Rename field in DayEntry model
tasks.prompt: In lib/models/day_entry.dart, rename the field 'xanax' to 'x' everywhere: the class field declaration (String x), constructor parameter, copyWith, toJson, fromJson, toDatabaseMap, fromDatabaseMap. Change the type from String to String with new valid values '1', '2', '3'. Update the default value from '< 0.5' to '1'. In toDatabaseMap use column name 'x'. In fromDatabaseMap read from 'x' with fallback to legacy column 'xanax' for migration compat.

cases: DayEntry constructor accepts x field with values '1','2','3'
toJson serializes x field as 'x'
fromJson deserializes 'x' field, defaults to '1' if missing
fromJson with legacy 'xanax' key: maps '< 0.5' to '1', '0.5 <= 1.0' to '2', '1.0 <= 1.5' to '3', 'None' to '1'
copyWith works for x field
toDatabaseMap outputs column 'x'
fromDatabaseMap reads column 'x'

tasks.done_when: All 7 unit tests pass. flutter analyze clean on day_entry.dart.

tasks.title: Schema migration v1 → v2 in DatabaseService
tasks.prompt: In lib/services/database_service.dart, bump _dbVersion to 2. Add onUpgrade parameter to openDatabase. In the upgrade handler for v1→v2: (1) ALTER TABLE day_entries ADD COLUMN x TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', (2) UPDATE day_entries SET x = CASE WHEN xanax = '< 0.5' THEN '1' WHEN xanax = 'None' THEN '1' WHEN xanax = '0.5 <= 1.0' THEN '2' WHEN xanax = '1.0 <= 1.5' THEN '3' ELSE '1' END, (3) Rebuild table without the xanax column (CREATE new table, INSERT SELECT, DROP old, RENAME). Also update _onCreate to create the table with 'x' instead of 'xanax' for fresh installs.

cases: Fresh install creates day_entries table with 'x' column and no 'xanax' column
v1→v2 migration: existing row with xanax='< 0.5' has x='1' after migration
v1→v2 migration: existing row with xanax='0.5 <= 1.0' has x='2' after migration
v1→v2 migration: existing row with xanax='1.0 <= 1.5' has x='3' after migration
v1→v2 migration: existing row with xanax='None' has x='1' after migration
After migration, xanax column no longer exists

tasks.done_when: All 6 migration tests pass. Existing test suite still passes.

tasks.title: Update WizardScreen radio buttons and tooltip
tasks.prompt: In lib/screens/wizard_screen.dart: (1) Rename _xanax to _x, default '1'. (2) Change _buildRadioPage title from 'Xanax?' to 'X'. (3) Replace radio options: value '1' label '1', value '2' label '2', value '3' label '3'. Remove the 'None' option. (4) Add an IconButton with Icons.info_outline in the top-right corner of the radio page. On tap, show a tooltip or dialog: '1 = 0, 2 = < 1, 3 = > 1'. (5) Update _finishWizard to pass 'x': _x in the result map.

cases: Radio page shows title 'X' not 'Xanax?'
Three radio buttons with labels '1', '2', '3' are present
No radio button with label 'None' or '< 0.5' exists
Info icon button is visible on the radio page
Tapping info icon shows tooltip text '1 = 0, 2 = < 1, 3 = > 1'
Finishing wizard returns map with 'x' key

tasks.done_when: All 6 widget tests pass.

tasks.title: Update DayListScreen to pass x from wizard result
tasks.prompt: In lib/screens/day_list_screen.dart, find the line that reads wizardResult['xanax'] (approx line 85) and change it to wizardResult['x'] ?? '1'.

cases: No references to 'xanax' remain in day_list_screen.dart
flutter analyze reports no errors

tasks.done_when: grep -c 'xanax' lib/screens/day_list_screen.dart returns 0. flutter analyze clean.

tasks.title: Update DayEntryScreen display chip
tasks.prompt: In lib/screens/day_entry_screen.dart, change _wizardTag('Xanax', entry.xanax) to _wizardTag('X', entry.x).

cases: No references to 'xanax' remain in day_entry_screen.dart
flutter analyze reports no errors

tasks.done_when: grep -c 'xanax' lib/screens/day_entry_screen.dart returns 0. flutter analyze clean.

tasks.title: Add sensitive-term blacklist to KeywordExtractor
tasks.prompt: In lib/services/keyword_extractor.dart, add a static const Set<String> _sensitiveTerms containing common sensitive categories: medication names (e.g. xanax, adderall, prozac, lexapro, zoloft, ambien, klonopin, valium, oxycodone, vicodin, suboxone), financial terms (e.g. debt, bankruptcy, loan, mortgage, overdue, collections), and relationship terms (e.g. divorce, affair, custody, abuse, assault, restraining). Add an optional parameter 'bool filterSensitive = true' to the extract() method. When true, filter out any extracted keyword that contains a term from _sensitiveTerms as a substring.

cases: Text containing 'xanax' does not produce 'xanax' as a keyword
Text containing 'prozac' does not produce 'prozac' as a keyword
Text containing 'debt' does not produce 'debt' as a keyword
Normal text like 'morning exercise routine' still extracts 'exercise' and 'routine'
filterSensitive=false bypasses the blacklist and returns sensitive terms
Blacklist matching is case-insensitive

tasks.done_when: All 6 unit tests pass.

tasks.title: Remove Top Keywords from StatisticsScreen
tasks.prompt: In lib/screens/statistics_screen.dart, remove the 'Top Keywords' section entirely: delete the _topTags state variable, remove the getTopTags() call from _loadStats(), and remove the conditional block that renders _buildSectionHeader('Top Keywords'...) and _buildTagCloud(). Delete the _buildTagCloud() method.

cases: No references to 'topTags', 'getTopTags', 'buildTagCloud', or 'Top Keywords' in statistics_screen.dart
flutter analyze reports no errors
StatisticsScreen still builds and shows entry count, wizard averages, and element averages

tasks.done_when: grep for 'topTags\|Top Keywords\|TagCloud' in statistics_screen.dart returns 0 matches. flutter analyze clean.

tasks.title: Verify keywords still display on DayEntryScreen
tasks.prompt: Verify that lib/screens/day_entry_screen.dart already renders auto-tags via _buildTagsCard() using loadDayEntryTags(). No code change needed — this is a verification-only task to confirm keywords are visible when drilling into a specific day.

cases: Open a day entry that has journal content with extracted tags
Confirm the 'Auto-Tags' card is visible on the DayEntryScreen
Confirm the Statistics screen no longer shows any keywords

tasks.done_when: Manual verification confirms tags appear on day detail but not on statistics.

tasks.title: Add wizard completion tracking to DatabaseService
tasks.prompt: In lib/services/database_service.dart, add a method hasCompletedWizardToday() that checks if a day_entries row exists for today's dateKey with non-default wizard values (i.e., the row was created via the wizard, not just a blank entry). Also add getWizardDataForToday() that returns the wizard fields (mood, sleep, x, workload, clouds, bubs, energy) from today's entry, or null if no wizard has been completed today.

cases: hasCompletedWizardToday returns false when no entry exists for today
hasCompletedWizardToday returns true when an entry with non-default wizard values exists
getWizardDataForToday returns null when no entry exists
getWizardDataForToday returns wizard field map when entry exists

tasks.done_when: All 4 unit tests pass.

tasks.title: Decouple wizard from entry creation in DayListScreen
tasks.prompt: In lib/screens/day_list_screen.dart, refactor the new-entry flow: (1) When creating a new entry, check hasCompletedWizardToday(). (2) If wizard is done: create the entry using getWizardDataForToday() values without showing the wizard. (3) If wizard is not done: show the wizard as before, then create the entry. (4) Allow creating multiple entries per day — change the unique constraint behavior so additional entries for the same dateKey update the existing row's content (append or navigate to the existing entry for editing).

cases: First entry of the day: wizard is shown
Second entry of the day: wizard is NOT shown, existing wizard data is used
New entry navigates to DayEntryScreen for content editing

tasks.done_when: Widget tests pass. Manual test: create two entries in one day, wizard only appears on first.

tasks.title: Add manual Check-In button to DayEntryScreen
tasks.prompt: In lib/screens/day_entry_screen.dart, add a FloatingActionButton or an icon button in the app bar with Icons.psychology and tooltip 'Daily Check-In'. On tap: (1) Check hasCompletedWizardToday(). (2) If already done, show a dialog: 'Check-in already completed today. Redo?' with Cancel/Redo buttons. (3) If not done or user chooses Redo, launch WizardScreen and update the current entry's wizard fields with the result.

cases: Check-In button is visible on DayEntryScreen
Tapping Check-In when wizard not done today launches WizardScreen
Tapping Check-In when wizard already done shows confirmation dialog
After completing wizard from entry screen, wizard fields update

tasks.done_when: Widget tests pass.

tasks.title: Create NotificationService for daily noon reminder
tasks.prompt: Create lib/services/notification_service.dart. Implement a NotificationService singleton with: (1) init() — initialize flutter_local_notifications with an Android channel 'daily_checkin'. (2) scheduleDailyNoonReminder() — schedule a daily repeating notification at 12:00 local time with title 'Daily Check-In' and body 'Time for your daily journal check-in'. (3) cancelReminder(). Call init() and scheduleDailyNoonReminder() from main.dart on app startup.

cases: NotificationService.init() completes without error
scheduleDailyNoonReminder() schedules a notification (mock verification)
cancelReminder() cancels pending notifications

tasks.done_when: Unit tests pass. Manual test on device: set phone clock to 11:59, wait for notification at 12:00.

In lib/main.dart, handle the notification tap payload to navigate to the wizard screen after authentication completes.

cases: Tapping the noon notification opens the app
After authentication, the wizard screen is displayed
Completing the wizard creates/updates today's entry with wizard data

tasks.title: Test on real device with Health Connect
tasks.prompt: Install the release build on a physical Android device with Health Connect. Verify: (1) Steps data pulls correctly. (2) Heart rate data displays. (3) Sleep data displays with stages. (4) App authenticates and locks correctly. (5) Data persists in encrypted DB.

cases: App installs from AAB on physical device
Health Connect permissions are requested and granted
Steps, heart rate, and sleep data appear on day entry
PIN/biometric auth works
Data is retained after force-closing and reopening

tasks.done_when: All 5 manual test cases pass on a physical device.

criteria: All unit and widget tests pass
No references to 'xanax' remain in lib/ directory (grep -r 'xanax' lib/ returns empty)
